---

This is a two-step assumption appointment approach, okay? Leave a voicemail or a text. I'm going to be in your area tomorrow afternoon about two o'clock and I want to drop off some things for you. It's a two-step approach because first there's a phone call, then there's a trip. And what I want you to bring is a gift bag filled with literature, a pen, logo, maybe those customized M&Ms, a pad, something, a business card, drop off something, some goody package for this client and I want you to hand deliver it to that person. If you can't put it in that person's hands, don't leave it unless you can leave it with an executive assistant, leave it with them or come back another day. Try the goody bag approach. It's two steps.
